items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• I speak I study
• You speak You study
• I speak English I study English
• I speak Spanish I study Spanish
• You speak Portuguese You study Portuguese

items.prompt: Eu falo Inglês Eu estudo inglês
items.answer: I speak English I study English

items.prompt: Eu falo Espanhol Eu estudo Espanhol
items.answer: I speak Spanish I study Spanish

items.prompt: Você fala português Você estuda Português
items.answer: You speak Portuguese You study Portuguese

items.prompt: Você fala Francês Você estuda Francês
items.answer: You speak French You study French

items.text: I speak English I study English
